Document
  └─ container[card]
     ├─ heading[3] "Account workspace"
     ├─ paragraph "Manage the active workspace and billing context."
     └─ tabs
        ├─ tab "Overview" active=true
        │  └─ grid[2] props={card=false}
        │     ├─ grid-item
        │     │  ├─ heading[3] "Workspace"
        │     │  ├─ container[form-group]
        │     │  │  ├─ text "Name"
        │     │  │  └─ input props={required=true, placeholder="Acme Design System", width=24}
        │     │  └─ switch "Public profile" checked=true
        │     └─ grid-item props={classes=["align-right"]}
        │        └─ row props={classes=["right"]}
        │           ├─ grid-item
        │           │  └─ button "Archive"
        │           └─ grid-item
        │              └─ button "Save workspace" props={variant="primary"}
        └─ tab "Billing" active=false
           └─ grid[3] props={card=true}
              ├─ grid-item props={classes=["card"]}
              │  ├─ heading[3] "Starter"
              │  ├─ paragraph "$9 / month"
              │  └─ button "Current"
              ├─ grid-item props={classes=["card"]}
              │  ├─ heading[3] "Pro"
              │  ├─ paragraph "$29 / month"
              │  └─ button "Upgrade" props={variant="primary"}
              └─ grid-item props={classes=["card"]}
                 ├─ heading[3] "Enterprise"
                 ├─ paragraph "Custom"
                 └─ button "Contact sales"
